steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: This is an Inferences question. The phrase "it is therefore unsurprising that" signals the blank must be the logical consequence of what the passage just established: (1) dramaturges help playwrights and musical theater writers refine stories and characters, and (2) choreographers are similarly concerned with storytelling and characterization, describing their dances as "expressions of narrative through movement." The correct choice follows directly from both premises.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — dramaturges can have a profound impact on the artistic direction of plays and musicals.: This restates something already implied at the beginning of the passage. It does not follow from the observation about choreographers — the logical chain requires a conclusion involving choreographers, not a repeat of the theater claim. ✗
  • Choice B — choreographers developing dances with narrative elements frequently engage dramaturges to assist in refining those elements.: This directly follows from both premises: choreographers tell stories through dance (like playwrights), and dramaturges help refine stories. So choreographers engaging dramaturges is exactly the "unsurprising" consequence the passage is building toward. ✓
  • Choice C — dances by choreographers who incorporate narrative elements are more accessible to audiences than dances by choreographers who do not.: The text never compares narrative and non-narrative dances or discusses audience accessibility. This introduces an unsupported claim. ✗
  • Choice D — some directors and actors rely too heavily on dramaturges to complete certain research tasks.: This contradicts the passage's positive framing and introduces a criticism that the text does not support. The passage is building toward a conclusion about choreographers, not a critique of over-reliance in theater. ✗
That matches Choice B — choreographers developing dances with narrative elements frequently engage dramaturges to assist in refining those elements..
